Entries.{{ModID}}_WizardMail: Enlightened @^, you have learned how to craft a potion machine and have made good use of your mushroom essence extractor. Come to my house and bring the following: ^ 1 Essence of the Great Wood Mushroom, 1 Morel and 1 red mushroom. ^ I will teach you the secrets of potion brewing. %item specialOrder {{ModID}}_WizardPotionQuest%%[#]Potion Brewing Course
Entries.{{ModID}}_WizardPotionQuest1_complete: Congratulations on completing my trial. With the book attached to this letter you will be able to brew more potions from now on.^ Magnus R.%item id MM_PotionBook1 1%%[#]Potion Knowledge
Entries.{{ModID}}_Wizard_SendsPotionBook2: Greetings @. ^^ You are now ready to learn how to brew even more potions. Very carefully read the book I sent you with this letter. ^ Magnus R.%item id MM_PotionBook2 1%%[#]More Potion Knowledge
Entries.{{ModID}}_Wizard_SendsPotionBook3: Greetings @. ^^ Your knowledge on potion brewing keeps broadening. Keep it up. ^ Magnus R.%item id MM_PotionBook3 1%%[#]Even More Potion Knowledge
Entries.{{ModID}}_Wizard_SendsPotionBook4: Greetings @. ^^ This is the final potion book I will be sending you. With this, you should now be able to brew all basic potions. But remain open-minded - there is many more potion recipes to learn. ^ Magnus R.%item id MM_PotionBook4 1%%[#]Much More Potion Knowledge

Entries.{{ModID}}_ItemDeliveryWizard: ItemDelivery/Potion Studies/Seems like the Wizard wants to teach you something about potions!/Bring him 1 Essence of the Great Wood Mushroom, 1 Morel and 1 poisonous mushroom/Wizard <Item Id> 1 Wizard (O)257 1 Wizard (O)420 1/-1/0/5000/-1/false/Ah, you have brought the required ingredients.
